title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Zoro, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Yamato, Unknown person #16 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a joke that deadly swords are believed to be cursed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's just how named blades are!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I consider it praise!! Let the weak spread their nonsense!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It means those swords fulfill their purpose well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I crafted my magnum opus...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...when I was still young.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The temper- Ament of that sword was some- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You'd get the chills just holding it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I named the blade after...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Lord of the Under- World!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Lord of the Under- World...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "Emma!"

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's called Shimotsuki Village!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That doesn't seem like a coincidence / now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you know the village was founded by Pirates?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: My grandma told me!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The master swordsmith, Shimotsuki Kozaburo,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Left this country illegally over 50 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That geezer was a samural of wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He was the swordsmith, Shimotsuki Kozaburo?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Named blades stay vigilant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They wait patiently to find a swordsman worthy of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is said a sword chooses its welder.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's what this is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's testing me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The sword isn't acting out of malice...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means I've just not been measuring up to its standards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You're telling me...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Oden was easily able to wield you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Even while this much haki was pouring out of him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Is that it, Emma?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Look here!! It's the pirate Hunter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: King- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's help him take his head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're sure to get a pro- motion if we do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do I do?! I can only appear it. I keep going all out with my haki,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But that could kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is how it's meant to be!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So you've also got...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...Kingly ambitions?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The world's greatest swordsman? That's perfect!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The future king of the pirates wouldn't settle for anything less!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...I guess you're right. After all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I made promises to my captain... and my oldest friend!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
